articles.q: How do I find a service?
articles.a: Open the Service Catalog at /repair. Use the sidebar filters — city, category, price range, and minimum rating — to narrow down results. Click any card to see full details, photos, reviews, and the company contact information.

articles.q: How do I submit a request?
articles.a: Click the Request button on any service card. Describe your task, set your budget range and city. Verified companies will respond with price offers within a few hours.

articles.q: Is Remont.kz free for clients?
articles.a: Yes — completely free. Browsing the catalog, submitting requests, receiving offers, and chatting with companies costs nothing. You only pay the contractor directly for the work they complete.

articles.q: How do I compare companies?
articles.a: Click the compare icon on up to 3 service cards. A floating bar appears at the bottom of the screen — click Compare to see them side by side: price, rating, city, availability, and more.

articles.q: How do I save services for later?
articles.a: Click the heart icon on any service card or service detail page. Saved services appear in the Saved Services section in your profile dropdown. You must be logged in as a client.

articles.q: Who can leave a review?
articles.a: Only clients whose request status reached Completed can leave a review for that specific company. This guarantees all ratings are from real, verified interactions — no fake reviews.

articles.q: How is the star rating calculated?
articles.a: The company overall rating is the arithmetic average of all client star ratings (1 to 5 stars). The count shown next to the rating is the total number of completed requests — not just reviewed ones.

articles.q: Can I edit or delete my review?
articles.a: Currently reviews cannot be edited after submission. If you submitted a review by mistake or wish to dispute it, contact support at support@remont.kz and we will review your request.

articles.q: Can companies respond to reviews?
articles.a: Yes. After a client leaves a review, the assigned company can post a public reply. This reply is visible to all users below the client review on the service detail page.

articles.q: How do I list my services?
articles.a: Register as a Company account. Go to Dashboard, then Services, then click Add service. Fill in the service name, category, description, price range, city, address, and upload up to 10 photos.

articles.q: How do I receive and manage client requests?
articles.a: Go to Dashboard, then Requests. You see two sections: Assigned to you (direct requests) and Unassigned requests (matching your categories). Click Make offer on unassigned ones to send your price.

articles.q: How do I update my company profile?
articles.a: Go to Profile (top-right menu, then Profile). You can update your company name, phone number, address, and profile photo. This information is shown to clients on your service cards and in the chat header.

articles.q: Can I deactivate a service without deleting it?
articles.a: Yes. In Dashboard, then Services, click the Active or Inactive badge on any service card to toggle its visibility. Inactive services are hidden from the catalog but preserved with all their data and reviews.

articles.q: How are companies verified?
articles.a: Companies register with their contact details and are visible in the catalog. We strongly recommend checking the rating, number of completed requests, and reviews before choosing. The platform shows real client feedback to help you decide.

articles.q: What if something goes wrong with my job?
articles.a: First, use the in-app chat to communicate the issue directly with the company. Most disputes are resolved this way. If you cannot reach an agreement, contact our support team at support@remont.kz with your request ID.

articles.q: Is my personal data safe?
articles.a: Yes. We store only the information you provide (email, name, phone). We do not share it with third parties. Passwords are hashed using bcrypt. All API connections use HTTPS encryption.

articles.q: How do I change my password?
articles.a: Go to Settings (top-right menu, then Settings). Enter your current password, then your new password twice. Minimum 6 characters. Click Update password. Your session remains active.

articles.q: I forgot my password. How do I reset it?
articles.a: Click Forgot password on the login modal. Enter your registered email address. We will send you a reset link valid for 1 hour. Click the link, enter your new password, and log in.

articles.q: Can I change my account role?
articles.a: Account roles cannot be changed after registration. If you need a different role, create a new account with a different email address. Contact support if you need your old account data transferred.

articles.q: How do I delete my account?
articles.a: Contact us at support@remont.kz with subject Account deletion request. Include your registered email. We will process your request within 5 business days and permanently delete all your data.

timeline.title: Client posts a request
timeline.desc: Describes the task, sets a budget range and city. Takes about 2 minutes.

timeline.title: Companies submit price offers
timeline.desc: Verified contractors see requests matching their category and city — and compete with offers.

timeline.title: Client accepts the best offer
timeline.desc: Compare by price, rating and reviews — one click to confirm. The company is notified instantly.

timeline.title: Chat opens — work begins
timeline.desc: Direct messaging with file sharing. Company updates status: Accepted to In progress.

timeline.title: Job completed — leave a review
timeline.desc: Company marks job as done. Client rates the work 1–5 stars. Rating updates the company profile.

about.title: About us
about.subtitle: Remont.kz — Kazakhstan's repair services marketplace
about.heroDesc: A full-stack marketplace connecting clients with verified repair and renovation contractors across Kazakhstan — built as a diploma project with production-grade architecture.
about.missionTitle: Repair should be simple, transparent & fast
about.missionDesc: Finding a trustworthy specialist in Kazakhstan used to mean weeks of searching, phone calls with no guarantees, and opaque pricing. Remont.kz changes that — post a request in 2 minutes, get competing offers the same day.
about.missionPoint2: Only verified companies can submit offers
about.missionPoint3: Ratings calculated from real completed jobs
about.missionPoint4: Direct chat between client and contractor
about.featuresDesc: 12 major feature areas, 34+ API endpoints, production-grade code.
about.techDesc: Modern, production-ready tools chosen for performance, type-safety and developer experience.
about.archDesc: Animated flow showing how data moves through the system in real time.
about.ctaDesc: Browse real services, create a request and get offers from verified contractors.

features.label: Client & Company roles
features.desc: Separate dashboards, permissions and flows for each role.

features.label: Real-time chat
features.desc: SSE-powered messaging with file uploads and read receipts.

features.label: Reviews & ratings
features.desc: Verified reviews from completed jobs only — no fake data.

features.label: Offer system
features.desc: Companies compete for requests; clients accept the best offer.

features.label: Email verification
features.desc: Token-based flow with Mailtrap/SMTP for all environments.

features.label: Geo-filtering
features.desc: Services filtered by city with OSM geocoding for coordinates.

features.label: Kanban board
features.desc: Company dashboard with drag-friendly request status tracking.

features.label: Service comparison
features.desc: Side-by-side compare up to 3 services with all attributes.

features.label: Admin panel
features.desc: User management, audit logs, promo codes, service moderation.

features.label: Portfolio system
features.desc: Companies upload before/after work photos to their profile.

features.label: Rate limiting
features.desc: In-memory rate limits on auth, offers, messages endpoints.

features.label: Email notifications
features.desc: Transactional emails on offer, acceptance, job completion.
